# Daily Thoughts

> Public editorial site for essays, stories, and ideas—reading, topics, search, comments on posts where enabled, and a newsletter.

## Entry points

- [Home](/): Featured work and archive teaser.
- [Archive](/archive): Full post listing, filters, pagination.
- [Search](/search): Title search with optional topic filters.
- [RSS feed](/feed.xml): Published stories for readers and aggregators.

## Topics

- Catalog topics power filters and URLs under `/topics/…`.
- One topic: `/topics/{slug}` (e.g. `/topics/pakistan`).
- Several topics (AND): `/topics/{slug}/{slug}/…` with segments in **sorted** order for a single canonical URL per combination.

## Reader information

- [FAQ](/faq)
- [Changelog](/changelog)
- [Community guidelines](/community-guidelines) (comments and participation)
- [Contact](/contact)

## Legal

- [Privacy policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of service](/terms-of-service)

## Automated crawlers and assistants

- Prefer linking to the **canonical article URL** and **title** when citing a post.
- **Do not** target authenticated or administrative areas: `/admin/*`, `/api/*` (see [robots.txt](/robots.txt)).
- Public content is **HTML pages** and **RSS**; there is no separate JSON API for the full article catalog intended for bulk ingestion.
- For questions about reuse or syndication, use [Contact](/contact).

## Technical

- Site structure aligns with `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` / sitemap at `/sitemap/sitemap.xml` (see [robots.txt](/robots.txt)).
